channel.title: Governance on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Governance on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA CySA+ (CS0-003): Reporting, Communication, and Compliance
item.category: "CompTIA CySA+ Course" , "Security Reporting" , "Compliance" , "Risk Communication" , "Security Metrics" , "Cybersecurity Analyst" , "Governance" , "Security Operations" , "Audit" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master reporting and communication for the CompTIA CySA+ CS0-003 exam. Learn vulnerability and incident reporting, security metrics, compliance frameworks, and communicating risk to stakeholders.

item.title: CompTIA SecOT+ (SOT-001): OT Risk Management
item.category: "CompTIA SecOT+ Course" , "OT Risk Management" , "ISA/IEC 62443" , "NERC CIP" , "Risk Assessment" , "Governance" , "Supply Chain Risk" , "Operational Technology" , "SOT-001" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master OT risk management for the CompTIA SecOT+ SOT-001 exam. Learn risk fundamentals, frameworks like ISA/IEC 62443 and NERC CIP, qualitative and quantitative assessments, risk treatments, governance artifacts, third-party risk, and change management.
